item.dawnbound.plant_fiber.tooltip: Twist into cordage for primitive tools.
item.dawnbound.cordage.tooltip: Used to bind crude tools together.
item.dawnbound.sharp_flint.tooltip: A cutting edge for your first knife.
item.dawnbound.sharp_stone.tooltip: A crude edge for early stone tools.
item.dawnbound.digging_stick.tooltip: A simple tool for loose soil, sand, and gravel.
dawnbound.message.requires_hatchet: You need a hatchet or axe for this.
dawnbound.message.logs_need_hatchet: Logs need a hatchet. Start with grass, leaves, or gravel.
dawnbound.message.requires_pickaxe: You need a pickaxe for this.
dawnbound.message.bare_hands_need_soft_m: Bare hands only handle soft materials. Try grass, leaves, gravel, or clay.
dawnbound.message.fiber_hint: Fiber can be twisted into cordage.
dawnbound.message.sharp_edge_hint: A sharp edge can become your first tool.
dawnbound.message.cordage_hint: Cordage binds your first crude tools.
item.dawnbound.saw.tooltip: Craft with logs to make planks; loses durability.
item.dawnbound.bound_saw.tooltip: A sturdier saw with a bound stone edge.
item.dawnbound.dawn_notes.tooltip: Use to reread your first survival steps.
dawnbound.onboarding.intro.2: Your bare hands cannot harvest logs.
dawnbound.onboarding.intro.3: Start with grass, leaves, gravel, and clay.
dawnbound.onboarding.intro.4: Make cordage, sharp stone, and your first hatchet.
dawnbound.command.guide.disabled: The Dawnbound guide command is disabled on this server.
advancements.dawnbound.root.title: Empty Hands
advancements.dawnbound.root.description: Dawnbound changes the first day. Start with what the ground gives you.
advancements.dawnbound.soft_beginnings.d: Gather plant fiber from grass or leaves.
advancements.dawnbound.sharp_edge.title: A Sharp Edge
advancements.dawnbound.sharp_edge.descri: Find sharp flint or sharp stone from gravel.
advancements.dawnbound.first_tool.title: First Tool
advancements.dawnbound.first_tool.descri: Make a flint knife or stone hatchet.
advancements.dawnbound.wood_finally.desc: Harvest a log with the right crude tool.
advancements.dawnbound.rough_planks.desc: Chop logs into rough planks before you have a saw.
advancements.dawnbound.clean_cut.title: Clean Cut
advancements.dawnbound.clean_cut.descrip: Use saw-cut planks for cleaner woodworking.
advancements.dawnbound.dawn_notes.title: Dawn Notes
advancements.dawnbound.dawn_notes.descri: Make a small guide you can reread when the first day gets confusing.
advancements.dawnbound.work_surface.desc: Make a flat stone work surface for early knapping.
advancements.dawnbound.knapped_head.desc: Knapp stone into a shaped head for stronger tools.
advancements.dawnbound.fire_pit.title: First Heat
advancements.dawnbound.fire_pit.descript: Build a fire pit for charcoal and early heat.
advancements.dawnbound.ore_crushing.desc: Make an ore crushing stone to prepare raw ore.
advancements.dawnbound.clay_kiln.title: Clay Holds Heat
advancements.dawnbound.clay_kiln.descrip: Build a clay kiln to turn crushed copper ore into ingots.
advancements.dawnbound.first_copper.desc: Smelt crushed copper ore with charcoal in a clay kiln.
advancements.dawnbound.bloomery.title: Hotter Work
advancements.dawnbound.bloomery.descript: Build a bloomery for the heat iron needs.
advancements.dawnbound.first_iron.title: First Iron
advancements.dawnbound.first_iron.descri: Smelt crushed iron ore with charcoal in a bloomery.
